task: Disable paid Tier3 backlog worker by default

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires real evidence and residual risk reporting for operations changes.
Code changes require completion evidence, verification, and deployment source-of-truth discipline.

problem: The existing paid com.harness.tier3-filter LaunchAgent ran scripts/run_tier3_backlog_worker.py every 30 minutes and consumed the daily Gemini paid budget early each day before hitting the cost gate.
fix: scripts/run_tier3_backlog_worker.py now exits by default unless PAID_TIER3_BACKLOG_ENABLED=true is explicitly set. The currently loaded Mac Mini com.harness.tier3-filter job was booted out.

verification.name: macmini paid tier3 launchd bootout
verification.command: launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u)/com.harness.tier3-filter && launchctl list | grep com.harness.tier3-filter || true
verification.result: pass: launchctl list returned no com.harness.tier3-filter entry

verification.name: local disabled default smoke
verification.result: pass: process exited 0 and logged paid Tier3 backlog worker disabled; set PAID_TIER3_BACKLOG_ENABLED=true to run

remaining_verification: After push, deploy to Mac Mini and run the disabled-default smoke there. Paid Tier3 can only be re-enabled intentionally with PAID_TIER3_BACKLOG_ENABLED=true.
